value.found_quote: Run `/tasks` and select the ultraplan entry to open a detail view with the session link, agent activity, and a **Stop ultraplan** action. Stopping archives the cloud session and clears the indicator; nothing is saved to your terminal.
value.rationale: The page describes ultraplan (a research preview feature of Claude Code by Anthropic) and explicitly mentions a "Stop ultraplan" action that archives the cloud session. The overarching ultraplan feature is described as being in research preview.
